limit_surface: input size recursion statement count bind count and batch count
required_limit_or_behavior: finite configured limits must be enforced before engine SBLR admission or trusted UDR handoff
diagnostic_vector: reference-shaped resource or syntax diagnostic with canonical message vector
mga_authority_rule: parser rejects or chunks work but never commits rolls back or recovers state itself

limit_surface: result streaming backpressure cancellation drain and timeout
required_limit_or_behavior: cancellation and timeout must produce reference-compatible status while server or MGA owns transaction finality
diagnostic_vector: cancel timeout drain and partial-result diagnostics with redaction
mga_authority_rule: cancel requests are routed to server transaction/session authority and cannot publish parser-owned finality

limit_surface: malformed frame command document and protocol abuse
required_limit_or_behavior: malformed inputs fail closed under memory CPU fd and wall-clock budgets
diagnostic_vector: protocol parse resource abuse and security diagnostics
mga_authority_rule: no reference or parser side effects become visible without engine-owned MGA evidence
